market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Premium City Edge Apt – Luxury Stay at £224/night
Modern 4‑Guest City Apt – Walk to Attractions
Cozy Edge Apartment – Perfect for Families
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to City Edge Apartments, an entire home perfectly suited for up to four guests seeking a comfortable stay in the vibrant heart of the city. Rated 4.58 stars from 401 reviews, this modern space offers a bright living area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a cosy bedroom setup that balances style with practicality. Enjoy easy access to local attractions, restaurants, and transport links, making it ideal for families, business travellers, or friends exploring together. The apartment’s contemporary design includes high‑speed Wi‑Fi, a dedicated workspace, and clean, fresh linens for a hassle‑free experience. While the listing is not yet a Superhost, the consistently high rating reflects the care taken to maintain a welcoming environment. At £224.40 per night, the rate reflects a premium offering in a market where the median nightly price is £175.00. Book now to experience a centrally located home with all the essentials for a memorable stay.
top_amenity_gaps: Entertainment amenities (e.g., TV, board games, streaming services)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Set a bright, high‑resolution photo of the living area or the building’s exterior as the cover image, as it instantly showcases the apartment’s scale and the city’s vibe.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £224.4 (28% above the city median of £175) to improve the current 15.2% 90‑day occupancy, which is well below the cohort median of 28.3%.
Add high‑value amenities such as outdoor space, dedicated parking, and entertainment options to justify the premium price and attract more bookings.
Upload professional photos covering every main room and set the cover photo to the most inviting space (living area or exterior) to boost click‑through rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate of £224 is 28% higher than the city median of £175, yet your 90‑day occupancy sits at just 15%, leaving a large revenue gap you can close quickly.
